label: Think node conditional ability cast last tick
description: Satisfied when the pawn last cast the specified ability within the configured tick window.

ability.label: Ability
ability.description: The ability whose last cast tick is checked.

minTicksAgo.label: Min ticks ago
minTicksAgo.description: The ability must have been cast at least this many ticks ago.

maxTicksAgo.label: Max ticks ago
maxTicksAgo.description: The ability must have been cast at most this many ticks ago. Defaults to int.MaxValue (no upper bound).
